title: Ship enterprise architecture acquisition surfaces and rollout-review content
summary: Records release evidence for the new enterprise-architecture landing page, the architecture-focused generic dashboard comparison page, and the architecture-review blog that ties control-plane behavior, release history, and customer-aware reporting into rollout approval workflows.
completed_todo_items: Ship 2 practical blog posts every sprint
Keep release-history generation tied to release evidence for meaningful public launches

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the new enterprise-architecture landing page, architecture comparison page, homepage discovery links, and architecture-review blog route all render from the production build and remain in the public release-history pipeline.
Confirms the enterprise-architecture acquisition batch is represented in release evidence so announcements and changelog generation stay current.

ops.rollback_plan: Revert the enterprise-architecture landing page, architecture comparison entry, architecture-review blog content, and release-evidence manifest in tokvera-dashboard and tokvera if the positioning or SEO direction needs to change.
